race.comment: One for the babies. HOLY TERROR (4) just ran into one better at Ipswich on debut and will have derived a stack of benefit from that day at the races. Hoop Stewart sticks in the stirrups and maps ideally for this from gate four. Should be right there when the whips are cracking. DUKE OF ALBEMARLE (1) showed ability saluting at Ipswich on debut before not being disgraced in G3 company last time out. Well placed in this company and watch for sharp improvement. PINKISH HUE (12) got the chocolates winning at Toowoomba when facing the starter for the first time and can go right on with the job now. TENGUN TOMMY (9) resumes here but has tuned up for this with a recent trial and is sure to be up to the mark out of the Gollan camp. Keep very safe. COOL GENT (2) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.
